recalls.Description: The recall pertains to the Amazon Basics Camping Folding Pocket Knife featuring a 3.5" blade crafted from black high carbon stainless steel, equipped with a pocket clip. The model number is B0DM5BJK3H, and affected items can be identified by manufacturing lot codes C25021766FJO, C25090466FJO, or C25090566FJO, which are printed on the packaging box.
recalls.Title: Amazon Recalls Amazon Basics Camping Folding Pocket Knives Due to Laceration Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are advised to contact Amazon at 855-215-5857 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. Additional information can be found online at https://amazonfoldingkniferecall.expertinquiry.com/ or by visiting www.Amazon.com and selecting "Recalls and Product Safety Alerts" at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Amazon Basics Camping Folding Pocket Knife

Images.Caption: Recalled Amazon Basics Camping Folding Pocket Knife
Recalled Amazon Basics Camping Folding Pocket Knife

Injuries.Name: Amazon received one report of the blade not remaining properly secured in the closed position. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from August 2025 through February 2026 for approximately $3.

Importers.Name: Amazon.com Services LLC, of Seattle, Washington

Hazards.Name: Risk of laceration due to potential failure of the folding mechanism to secure the blade.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the recalled knife immediately and register for the recall at https://amazonfoldingkniferecall.expertinquiry.com/. A prepaid return kit and instructions will be provided for the safe return of the knife to Amazon. Upon receipt, a full refund will be issued to the original payment method or as an Amazon gift card.

recalls.metaDescription: Amazon recalls Camping Folding Pocket Knives due to laceration risks. Stop using immediately and register for a refund.

recalls.Description: Ozark Trail Tabletop 1-Burner Butane Camping Stoves, identified by model number BG2247A1, are being recalled due to serious fire and burn hazards. These stoves are dark green and feature an orange "Ozark Trail" logo on the front, with the model number located on a gray label inside the fuel compartment. Consumers are urged to take this recall seriously to ensure safety.
recalls.Title: Recall of Ozark Trail Tabletop 1-Burner Butane Camping Stoves Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, contact Walmart at 800-925-6278, available from 7 a.m. to 9 p.m. CT, or visit www.walmart.com/help or https://corporate.walmart.com/recalls.

Products.Name: Ozark Trail Tabletop 1-Burner Butane Camping Stove

Images.Caption: Recalled Ozark Trail Tabletop 1-Burner Butane Camping Stove, model BG2247A1
Recalled Ozark Trail Tabletop 1-Burner Butane Camping Stove, model BG2247A1

Injuries.Name: China Window Industry Co., Ltd. has received 26 reports of the camping stoves exploding or catching fire, including 16 reports of injuries such as second-degree burns.

Manufacturers.Name: China Window Industry Co., Ltd, of Taipei, Taiwan

Retailers.Name: Available at Walmart stores nationwide and online at Walmart.com from March 2023 to October 2025, priced between $8 and $45.

Remedies.Name: Return the recalled stoves to any Walmart store for a full refund

recalls.metaDescription: Ozark Trail Tabletop 1-Burner Butane Camping Stoves recalled due to fire hazards. Return for a full refund.

recalls.Description: Anker Innovations has announced a recall for the lithium-ion battery packs used in their EverFrost Coolers. Designed for outdoor activities like camping, travel, and fishing, these coolers are dark gray with wheels and a drop-down handle. They feature a blue charging port for alternative power sources such as plug-in or solar. The cooler's name, 'Anker EverFrost,' is displayed in silver and blue on the side, with the model number located on the bottom surface. The recall includes several models, including the Anker Detachable Battery Pack and various sizes of the EverFrost Powered Coolers.
recalls.Title: Recall of Anker EverFrost Lithium-Ion Battery Coolers Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled coolers immediately and contact Anker at 800-988-7973 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday. You can also reach them via email at support@anker.com or visit https://support.anker.com/s/emailcontactus. For additional support, a LiveChat option is available at https://support.anker.com/s/contact-us, or visit https://www.anker.com/anker-solix/cooler-battery-recall-pps for more details.

Packaging of recalled EverFrost Battery Powered Cooler Model A17A0

Packaging of recalled EverFrost Battery Powered Cooler Model A17A1

Packaging of recalled EverFrost Battery Powered Cooler Model A17A2
Recalled EverFrost Detachable Battery Pack A17B0
Recalled EverFrost Detachable Battery Pack A17B0

Injuries.Name: The firm has received five reports of overheating, smoke and/or fire. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Anker Innovations Limited, of Hong Kong

Retailers.Name: Available at Best Buy, TD Synnex, and other retailers nationwide, as well as online at kickstarter.com from May 2023 to September 2023, priced between $250 and $950.

Hazards.Name: Risk of overheating batteries leading to fire hazards.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the coolers and contact Anker for a free replacement battery pack. Dispose of recalled batteries according to local regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: Anker recalls EverFrost coolers due to fire hazards from lithium-ion batteries. Contact Anker for a free replacement.
